content:
# ElizaOS Daily Summary: Jun 26, 2026

On June 26, 2026, the project focused on a major architectural transition to Gemma-based model tiers and significant infrastructure hardening. The team successfully standardized training pipelines, consolidated plugin build configurations, and resolved critical cloud deployment issues to improve overall system reliability.

## ✅ Completed Work

**Gemma Model Transition & Training Standardization**
*   Completed the migration of training scripts, benchmarks, and mobile fixtures from legacy Qwen-based tiers to the new Gemma-backed Eliza-1 tiers ([elizaos/eliza#9825](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9825), [elizaos/eliza#9805](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9805), [elizaos/eliza#9804](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9804), [elizaos/eliza#9803](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9803), [elizaos/eliza#9796](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9796), [elizaos/eliza#9787](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9787)).
*   Updated documentation and quantization tools to support the 2B-27B Gemma range, ensuring consistency across local and cloud environments ([elizaos/eliza#9798](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9798), [elizaos/eliza#9792](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9792), [elizaos/eliza#9767](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9767)).

**Build System & CI/CD Infrastructure**
*   Consolidated plugin `build.ts` files into a shared driver to reduce technical debt and redundant configurations ([elizaos/eliza#9826](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9826), [elizaos/eliza#9828](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9828)).
*   Enhanced CI/CD reliability by optimizing Turbo cache usage and migrating CodeQL runs to dedicated robot runners ([elizaos/eliza#9824](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9824), [elizaos/eliza#9821](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9821), [elizaos/eliza#9815](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9815)).

**Agent Framework & Cloud Enhancements**
*   Hardened the desktop shell and integrated permission-aware access-context filters into chat retrieval paths ([elizaos/eliza#9752](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9752), [elizaos/eliza#9725](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9725)).
*   Resolved critical cloud deployment issues, including sign-in redirects and pipeline failures, while enabling `apps-deploy` for all production organizations ([elizaos/eliza#9813](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9813), [elizaos/eliza#9774](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9774), [elizaos/eliza#9789](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9789)).

## 🏗️ Work in Progress

**New Pull Requests**
*   [elizaos/eliza#9812](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9812): Cleanup of API keys page (row copy/optimistic delete).
*   [elizaos/eliza#9806](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9806): CI fix for stale cancelled aggregate failures.
*   [elizaos/eliza#9802](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9802): CI fix for stale cancelled aggregate failures.
*   [elizaos/eliza#9780](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9780): Core fix for line wrapping in `findWebLookupActionNames`.
